title: Application of spatial transcriptomics across organoids for a high-resolution, spatial whole-transcriptome benchmarking dataset.
snippet: Stem cell-derived organoids hold promise to model tissue-specific diseases. To enable this, it is crucial to assess how transcriptional signatures, cellular organization, and composition of organoids compare tocounterparts. However, spatial transcriptomics has been challenging to apply to organoids to elucidate regional molecular identity. This study presen...
